title: Send approved descriptor-fetch question or record selected route
reason_not_sent: No explicit user approval to send external email from the user's identity. Mac dry-run also showed the default From would be enzo <enzo@enzos-Mac-mini.local>, which is not a public mailing-list identity.

draft.subject: Question: Allwinner A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC remains in DESC_READ under mainline

mac.transport_risk: Default local From identity is not suitable for public kernel lists unless the user explicitly wants it.

strix.transport_risk: Strix is not ready to send without installing/configuring git-send-email or another mail transport.

next_required_user_decision: Approve sending the public-clean draft, or choose a non-email route such as Radxa issue/discussion.
